title: Spicy Crumbly Saudi Chicken Wrap
description: A fiery, low‑calorie wrap featuring grilled chicken breast marinated in bold Saudi spices, topped with a crunchy crumbly topping and wrapped in a thin flatbread.
instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan over medium‑high heat.
In a bowl, combine yogurt, garlic, cumin, paprika, coriander, chili flakes, lemon juice, salt, and pepper to make a creamy sauce.
Add the chicken strips to the sauce, ensuring they’re well coated; let marinate for 10 minutes.
Place the marinated chicken on the grill, cooking 3‑4 minutes per side until the internal temperature reaches 75°C (165°F).
Remove the chicken, let rest 2 minutes, then slice into bite‑sized pieces.
Lay out the flatbreads, spread a thin layer of the remaining sauce, and top with grilled chicken strips.
Sprinkle the toasted sesame seeds over the chicken for a crunchy, crumbly finish.
Fold the flatbread into a wrap and serve immediately.
